task.title: How to use the Review Rate Analysis Report to find specific information?
For which payer the highest number of reviews were done? What percentage of the reviews were for Medicaid cases?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Details tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Reviews by Payer or Financial Class chart.

info.p:
The chart displays total review counts and percentage of total reviews for each payer. It also helps you to identify the payer that has done the highest number of total reviews in the selected date range. Use this chart to analyze the following:
What percentage of total reviews were for the Medicaid cases?
What percentage of total initial reviews were for the Medicare cases? To analyze the total initial review percentage, select Initial Review from the Review Type filter.
Out of total reviews performed by a CDS, and what percentage of reviews were for the Managed Medicare cases. Select the CDS name from the CDS filter.

task.title: For which unit the highest number of reviews were done?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Details tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Reviews by Unit chart.
step.stepresult:
This chart displays count and percentage of total reviews for each unit. It also helps you to identify the unit that has done the highest number of total reviews in the selected date range. Use this chart to analyze the following:
What percentage of total reviews were done for the Internal Med unit? Select Initial Review from the Review Type filter to analyze initial reviews for Internal Med unit.
Out of total reviews performed by a CDS, and what percentage of reviews were for the Internal Med unit. Select the CDS name from the CDS filter.

task.title: How many initial and additional reviews were done by each CDS? Who are my best CDS performers?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Details tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Reviews by CDS chart.
step.stepresult:
This chart displays initial and additional reviews by each CDS. Use this chart to analyze the following:
Count of initial and additional reviews performed for the Medicare cases by each CDS. To view the count of Medicare cases, select Medicare from the Payer filter.
Which CDS has the highest count of initial reviews.
Which CDS had reviewed the highest number of cases for Internal Med unit.

task.title: Were the reviews concurrent or retrospective? What percentage of total reviews were retrospective reviews?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Details tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Reviews by Review Timing chart.
step.stepresult:
This chart displays count and percentage of concurrent reviews and retrospective reviews. Use this chart to analyze the following:
Percentage of retrospective reviews out of total reviews
Which CDSs has performed the retrospective reviews? To view the list click on the Retrospective section in the chart and the chart displays the review counts for the CDSs who performed retrospective reviews in the selected date range.
List of encounters for which retrospective reviews are performed. To view the list click on the Retrospective section in the chart. The Encounter Details tabular report now displays the details of the encounters for which the retrospective reviews are performed.
Number of additional reviews done retrospectively. To view the additional review count, select Additional Reviews from the Review Type filter.

task.title: Which CDS should I target to improve Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hrs.)?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Details tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Analyze the Avg. Initial Review TAT (Hrs) by CDS chart.
step.stepresult: This chart displays average initial review turnaround time for each CDS and helps you to identify the CDSs with lowest average turnaround time. Also use this chart to analyze the Average TAT (Hrs) for Medicare cases for each CDS.

task.title: Are there any inpatient cases that are reviewed and later converted to outpatient? What is the count of such cases?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Review Activity Details tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the activity date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Activity Date range filter.
Select Outpatient from the Visit Type filter.
Analyze the Review Activity Details report.
step.stepresult: The report now displays data only for the outpatient encounters. Analyze various charts on this report to identify the number of reviews done, which CDSs had worked on those cases, payer associated with those cases, etc.
